content.en:
"Key Fragment No. 2!"

Ye Tian smiled.

After opening so many treasure chests, he finally found the second key fragment, the second key fragment is very rare, but he didn't expect to find one.

With the second key fragment, he can collect other key fragments to craft the small key.

The small key can be exchanged for incomparably precious resources and treasures, which can be said to be extremely valuable.

Ye Tian also went to Tuta's treasure exchange list before, some of which could only be exchanged with small keys, and were limited to only one, among which there were many resource treasures that were of great help to him.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sorted it out, and he almost collected all the 108 key fragments that synthesized the small key, and there was only one key fragment left, that is, the No. 333 key fragment.

These key fragments are not difficult to collect and can even be bought.

However, Ye Tian didn't plan to buy it, he was going to continue to look for it here, if he could find it, it would naturally be the best.

After another period of time, Ye Tian found some Void Mist Beasts again, snatched their treasure chests, and took the key fragments inside.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian found the fragment of the No. 333 key.

"Got the little key!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

He didn't rush to synthesize, but continued to search for the key shards here, and he didn't want to waste this time anyway, it was still a long time before he left.

After all, you can only come in once in 10,000 Realms River Year, and the next time you come in, you will have to come in 10,000 Realms River Year.

Time passed, and after a long time, when the time came, Ye Tian was moved out by the misty exploration time and space.

In the middle of the tuta, Ye Tian appeared here, with a smile on his face.

"This time the harvest was too big, I found tens of thousands of key fragments with just one key fragment, and I also got together a small key. Ye Tian was quite excited.

Immediately, he began to synthesize the little key.

Crafting can only be crafted in a tuta, as this is the rule here, and cannot be crafted in the outside world.

Airplanes!!!!

108 key fragments appeared in the void, and in an instant, they formed a small key.

The small key with the golden light fell into Ye Tian's hand, and this small key alone was enough to make the Three Realm-level controllers fight.

"It's time to exchange for a treasure. "

Ye Tian came to the exchange area, there are many eternal controllers here, all of them come to take a look, but no one exchanges.

After all, there are too few eternal controllers who have a small key or a serial key.

Soon, Ye Tian locked a treasure.

"Golden Crow Blood Fruit!"

This is an invaluable treasure that can be used to increase the body of control.

Ye Tian's current control body is a sixth-level control body, and the Golden Crow Blood Fruit can help him improve from a sixth-level control body to a seventh-level control body.

This means that his strength is likely to be directly promoted from a first-level master to a second-level master.

"Exchange for Golden Crow Blood Fruit!"

Ye Tian took out the small key and asked.

The application in the Tuta was not confidential, so Ye Tian took out the small key to apply for the Golden Crow Blood Fruit, which was naturally seen.

"Oh my God, someone in control has synthesized a little key. "

A ninth-level master was shocked.

"Who is this, luck is so good, synthesized the little key. "

"Moreover, he exchanged for the Golden Crow Blood Fruit, which is a good thing!"

"This controller should be a first-realm level controller, after obtaining the Golden Crow Blood Fruit this time, it is very likely that his strength will reach the second-level master!"

Suddenly, many Eternal Masters were envious.

Airplanes!

The exchange was successful, and the Golden Crow Blood Fruit fell into Ye Tian's hands and was collected by him.

At this time, a Three Realms-level master came over and said, "This friend, I want to buy the Golden Crow Blood Fruit in your hand. "

"Not for sale!"

Ye Tian directly refused.

What are you kidding, with the Golden Crow Blood Fruit, his strength will transform, how could he sell such a good thing?

Even if he exchanged a boundary river monument with him, he wouldn't change it.

After all, the Boundary River Monument can be obtained in the future, but if the Golden Crow Blood Fruit is gone, then it is really gone.

The Three Realms-level controller smiled and said, "Friend, I am the son of the City Lord of the Wind Capital, how about giving face, my father's Wind Capital Controller is the Six Realms-level controller!"

Six Realms-level Controllers, ordinary Controllers will definitely be shocked when they hear this realm, this is a powerful existence second only to the Seven Realms-level Controllers, who dares to offend.

"Even if your father is a Ten Realm-level master, if he doesn't sell it, he won't sell it!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Good!"

The other party was a little annoyed, but he didn't make a move.

After all, Tucheng is forbidden to make a move, everyone has to maintain this rule, and he doesn't dare to violate it.

What's more, this is still Tuta, and he doesn't dare to mess around.

Get out of Tuta.

Ye Tian began to retreat and practice penance at his residence in Tucheng, refining the Golden Crow Blood Fruit.

Rumble!!!

The energy of the Golden Crow Blood Fruit exploded within him, frantically refining his controlling body.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's controlled body gradually improved from level six to level seven.

When Ye Tian's control body reached the level of level seven, his strength immediately skyrocketed.

Click!

Ye Tian's body moved slightly, the void was torn, and his physical body was too much stronger.

In the days that followed, he gradually took control of his body of control, and no longer caused the leakage of power.

"My strength has already reached the level of the Second Realm Master, if there is enough Golden Crow Blood Fruit, I can definitely raise the body of control to level eight, and my strength can definitely reach the level of the Level of the Third Realm Master. Ye Tian said confidently.

"It takes 10,000 river years to explore time and space in the fog before you can enter it again, and there are too few key fragments obtained in other levels, so there is no need to break in, so let's go to Tongyang Mountain to visit the Enlightenment River Monument." "

Ye Tian walked out of Tucheng.

And not long after leaving Tucheng, a figure stopped Ye Tian.

"It's you!"

Ye Tian recognized it, this was the Three Realms-level controller who was looking for him to buy the Golden Crow Blood Fruit, the son of the Wind Capital Controller, and was called the Haichen Controller.

"Golden Crow Blood Fruit, I've already refined it. "

Ye Tian said lightly.

"I know!" Haichen said coldly, "I just want to teach you a lesson, this is the end of not giving me face." "

"It's up to you!"

Ye Tian sneered.

Although he is only a second-realm controller, it doesn't mean that he is worse than Haichen's controller.

He has refined and devoured the Devouring Mountain, even if it is the attack of Haichen's controller, he can devour and weaken it, and Haichen's controller can't hurt him at all.

"Didn't you just break through to the Second Realm level controller, let you know how powerful the Third Realm level controller is!"

Haichen's controller made a move, holding a spear of a high-ranking control realm soldier, and attacked Ye Tian.
